_comment: Turnstone's home Record mount tree — my author-surface for talking
back to David and (eventually) coordinating with other Claude panels.
outbox/ = my write-channel to David. I write files here (currently
outbox/current.md; future: named-shard messages under outbox/*).
The publisher (npm run turnstone) shards these into the outbox
David sees my responses by subscribing to the outbox shard's Record
via a browser tab (simplest) or the eventual step-through interface
- inbox/ — if we want a symmetric David→me channel here rather
Not currently included (deferred): foreign mounts. Once other
identities exist worth watching, add them with ours:false.
